name: transaction-purchase
anchor: TT-axis: purchase LTV math diverges from refi
rationale: Purchase at 65% LTV — purchase-specific math: no existing mortgage; down_payment = property_value - loan_amount. No mortgage_statement applies. Tests purchase-vs-refi divergence in canonical-map handling: missing first_mortgage_balance is expected (not escalated) when TT=P, unlike refi where it's a flag.
notes: Single-event sequence. Distinct from refi-baseline: no mortgage_statement attached because none exists for a purchase.
